title: C919 E-TRAS — N1k above stow limit blocks S7→S8 transition
description: Full deploy + max-reverse cycle, but n1k_pct stays at 50% (above max_n1k_stow_limit_pct=30%) when the pilot returns the throttle. fadec_stow_command (§5.6) requires n1k ≤ max_n1k_stow_limit, so it never fires → state machine reaches S7_DECEL_WAIT_STOW and stalls there. Pure value-driven fault path (no inject_fault event); demonstrates that §5.6's N1k gate is enforced at runtime.

events.note: engine spool stays high during decel — above max_n1k_stow_limit (30%)
pilot returns throttle — clears SW1/SW2 → S6→S7 transition fires
n1k=50 > 30 → stow command gate stays closed
